data.title: Etsy adds new AI tools for sellers on its marketplace
data.description: The AI tools, which are optional for sellers, are to designed to improve messaging and efficiency on Etsy's marketplace.

data.title: Macy's raises guidance, emphasizes omnichannel strategy as Q2 sales beat expectations
data.description: Macy's net sales fell 2.5% year over year but exceeded guidance for its fiscal second quarter. Company leaders credited a strong strategy and omnichannel emphasis for Macy's turnaround successes so far.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: What changed when de minimis rules ended
data.description: Tapestry, Temu, Shein and Etsy all face a new environment without de minimis exceptions when small shipments arrive into the U.S.

data.title: Home Depot completes acquisition, eyes digital expansion for pro customers
data.description: Home Depot has completed its $5.5 billion acquisition of GMS Inc., bringing the specialty building products distributor under its SRS Distribution subsidiary and signaling a push to expand digital and fulfillment services for professional contractors.

data.title: Stellantis expands fleet, wholesale, and digital operations
data.description: The effort also emphasizes digital integration, allowing orders, inventory, and billing to be managed online.
